2605.00674.title: Beyond Benchmarks: MathArena as an Evaluation Platform for Mathematics with LLMs
2605.00674.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are becoming increasingly capable mathematical collaborators, but static benchmarks are no longer sufficient for evaluating progress: they are often narrow in scope, quickly saturated, and rarely updated. This makes it hard to compare models reliably and track progress over time. Instead, we need evaluation platforms: continuously maintained systems that run, aggregate, and analyze evaluations across many benchmarks to give a comprehensive picture of model performance within a broad domain. In this work, we build on the original MathArena benchmark by substantially broadening its scope from final-answer olympiad problems to a continuously maintained evaluation platform for mathematical reasoning with LLMs. MathArena now covers a much wider range of tasks, including proof-based competitions, research-level arXiv problems, and formal proof generation in Lean. Additionally, we maintain a clear evaluation protocol for all models and regularly design new benchmarks as model capabilities improve to ensure that MathArena remains challenging. Notably, the strongest model, GPT-5.5, now reaches 98% on the 2026 USA Math Olympiad and 74% on research-level questions, showing that frontier models can now comfortably solve extremely challenging mathematical problems. This highlights the importance of continuously maintained evaluation platforms like MathArena to track the rapid progress of LLMs in mathematical reasoning.
2605.00674.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 正在成為越來越有能力的數學合作夥伴，但靜態基準已不再足以評估進展：它們往往範圍狹窄、迅速飽和，且很少更新。<lb/>這使得可靠地比較模型和追蹤進展變得困難。<lb/>相反，我們需要評估平台：持續維護的系統，運行、聚合和分析多個基準的評估，以提供模型在廣泛領域內性能的全面圖景。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們在原始的 MathArena 基準上進行擴展，將其範圍從最終答案奧林匹克問題大幅擴展到一個持續維護的數學推理評估平台，專為 LLMs 設計。<lb/>MathArena 現在涵蓋了更廣泛的任務，包括基於證明的競賽、研究級 arXiv 問題，以及在 Lean 中生成正式證明。<lb/>此外，我們為所有模型維護明確的評估協議，並隨著模型能力的提升定期設計新的基準，以確保 MathArena 保持挑戰性。<lb/>值得注意的是，最強的模型 GPT-5.5 現在在 2026 年美國數學奧林匹克中達到 98% 的正確率，並在研究級問題上達到 74%，顯示出前沿模型現在可以輕鬆解決極具挑戰性的數學問題。<lb/>這突顯了像 MathArena 這樣的持續維護評估平台的重要性，以追蹤 LLMs 在數學推理方面的快速進展。
2605.00674.author: Jasper Dekoninck et.al.
2605.00674.authors: Jasper Dekoninck, Nikola Jovanović, Tim Gehrunger, Kári Rögnvalddson, Ivo Petrov, Chenhao Sun, Martin Vechev
